---
title: "Connor Flynn"
image: "cover_photo.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/connor-flynn-0699241bb/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/ConnorFlynn"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website  
---
 
### Aloha, 

My name is Connor Flynn. I am currently a Data Analyst at Chaminade University of Honolulu. 

I strive to utilize data science in overcoming environmental and social challenges facing Hawaiʻi. 

I am a part of the innovative and exciting things happening here:

- [CIFAL Honolulu](https://chaminade.edu/cifal-honolulu/){target="_blank"}
- [Chaminade University Data Science Program](https://chaminade.edu/nsm/data-science/){target="_blank"}
- [The Bren School, UC Santa Barbara](https://bren.ucsb.edu/){target="_blank"}
- [NCEAS](https://www.nceas.ucsb.edu/){target="_blank"}
